mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_REPORT( ID, PROJECT_ID, AUTHOR_USER_ID, PERIOD_TYPE, PERIOD_START, PERIOD_END, SUMMARY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES( #{id}, #{projectId}, #{authorUserId}, #{periodType}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd}, #{summary}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_REPORT SET PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}, AUTHOR_USER_ID = #{authorUserId}, PERIOD_TYPE = #{periodType}, PERIOD_START = #{periodStart}, PERIOD_END = #{periodEnd}, SUMMARY = #{summary}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
